SELECT toDecimal64OrNull(value, 2) AS converted_value, toTypeName(converted_value) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id UInt32, number String);
SELECT id, toDecimal64OrNull(number, 3) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM nested_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT a.id, toDecimal64OrNull(a.value, 4) AS decimal_value, b.id, toDecimal64OrNull(b.value, 2) AS joined_decimal_value FROM test_table AS a JOIN join_table AS b ON a.value = b.value;
SELECT toDecimal64OrNull(toString(123.456), 4) AS val1, toDecimal64OrNull('0.0001', 18) AS val2, toDecimal64OrNull(toString('Inf'), 18) AS val3, toTypeName(val1), toTypeName(val2), toTypeName(val3);
SELECT toDecimal64OrNull(data, 5) AS decimal_data FROM complex_table WHERE toDecimal64OrNull(data, 5) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT value, toDecimal64OrNull(toString(value), 10) AS safe_decimal FROM (SELECT '350.043' AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'Infinity' UNION ALL SELECT '-Infinity' UNION ALL SELECT '345678' UNION ALL SELECT 'NaN');
